summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Territory Atlas map visualization app. All core features working correctly including map rendering, layer controls, analytics, and file upload UI. Backend APIs fully functional with 13 city data points and 1859 county data points loaded.

design_issues.issue: County choropleth shading may not be fully visible due to TopoJSON county name matching issues

passed_tests: Layer controls functionality (4 city + 3 county layers)
Layer toggle functionality with real-time updates
Analytics panel with top opportunity zones
